base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brinstar_zone_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 metroid. Brinstar — starting zone of Zebes. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Brinstar — starting zone of Zebes; green organic caverns + Chozo Shrine containing Morph Ball + exits up to Kraid's Lair and down to Norfair. Largest zone on sheet (7808×4688)
